yuzu is 8/10 without her unique wep and 11/10 with it
Signature wp are generally trash, you get better value from equipment in dungeons

don't think there is really a replacement for yuzu weapon
because you either have to spend real money, or pull 100 times, which is hard pity. But when you pull 60 times you can get legendary bones. those are better value

With dungeon farming you can eventually get red rarity wp with high number of stars

you have almost maxed yuzu so rinne will see no use
and want to switch it up
same as all other ninja. either all strength or strength speed split
Frontline higher chance to be hit
back line take less dmg and likely to dodge, but magic ignore that
There is also a strat of making ninja front due to their high EVA stats

people in the frontline take a majority of the attacks. backline can only be attacked by ranged enemies, certain boss attacks, mages, or if someone in the frontline goes down. most of the time your backline won't be taking damage. you need to worry about your frontline and keeping them alive

Also, some knowledge. The max level in this game currently is 60. If you reach a level cap, the exp overflows so you don't lose exp when you reach level caps. You can sit at level 20 for a long time, finally promote, and reach level 30-40 instantly

Can someone explain what is Trickal?
It's AFK Arena combined with Autochess
So you get the passive leveling as well as needing to upgrade units from 1 to 6 stars
It's basically a hybrid of both
You also can equip equipment for individual units or get team buffs (which is in a separate gacha pool)
But basically they have your usual 3-5 pool. They also have a special pool called Eldynes, which is like your Special 5 star pool
